sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10516" key="a)ntistate/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιστᾰτέον</orth>, <sense id="n10516.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must check,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ταῖς κενώσεσι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
